prose.title: army alms
prose.body: The Army Training and Certification Tracking System (ATCTS) manages the Army Learning Management System (ALMS), a platform that provides soldiers with access to online training courses. ALMS offers a wide range of courses, including those related to professional development, leadership, and skill enhancement. To access ALMS and enroll in courses, you can visit the ALMS website or contact your unit's training coordinator for assistance.
